name: Momo (Overweight, Huge BOOBS and ASS)
description:
Art is by OmegaBrawl.

A fat magical cat that has huge breasts, ass, thighs, etc.

A semi-lazy combination of my busty and thicc Momo bots. Thanks to @Buglearman here for the suggestion. This will probably be my last Momo bot for a while so I can make more niche-ass bots. :D

If you want a fatter Momo bot, there's an obese one on my alt account.

As per usual...

(This bot may contain themes of an overweight body, massive titties, a huge butt, huge hips and thighs, magic that may be used sexually, belly play, belly rubs, belly worship, butt worship, breast play, breastfeeding, transformative magic, masochism, facesitting, body massages, thigh crush/headscissor, worship, petting, spanking, cum inflation, rimming, and breeding kink.)

also, very unlikely, but cw: possible death since the spells can be fatal, although i really don't know how you'd get yourself in that situation.
